remarks: Experience timeless elegance and modern comfort in this beautifully appointed 5-bedroom, 2.5-bath Colonial, ideally situated on a professionally landscaped property just minutes from the charming village center of New Canaan. Designed for both everyday living and effortless entertaining, this exceptional residence showcases expansive living spaces, rich hardwood flooring, custom millwork, and an inviting family room centered around a marble fireplace. The thoughtfully designed floor plan extends outdoors to an oversized deck and private patio overlooking lush landscaping, creating a tranquil setting for entertaining or quiet relaxation. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite offers a peaceful retreat, complemented by three additional bedrooms. The fully finished walkout lower level offers remarkable versatility with an expansive recreation room, bonus room, and a fifth bedroom, perfect for guests, multigenerational living, a home office, fitness studio, media room, or possible in-law. Enjoy the best of New Canaan living with close proximity to award-winning schools, boutique shopping, fine dining, parks, cultural attractions, and Metro-North service to New York City. A home that effortlessly combines luxury, location, and lifestyle, this is a rare offering in one of Fairfield County's most coveted communities.
